ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class level of the athlete */,
  "nisca_ranking" REAL /* NISCA ranking of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the athlete in the team */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the athlete */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES class_levels ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., track, swimming) */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport (e.g., track and field, swimming) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Names of sponsors for the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "gold_medals" INTEGER /* Number of gold medals won */,
  "silver_medals" INTEGER /* Number of silver medals won */,
  "bronze_medals" INTEGER /* Number of bronze medals won */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score achieved in the event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the athlete in the event (for events like running) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered by the athlete (for events like long jump) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the athlete's performance */,
  "is_record" INTEGER /* Indicates if the athlete set a record in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_levels" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class level */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, admin, data analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
